money_flow_summary: Money flows from travelers through OTAs (Expedia, Booking.com take 15-25% commissions), airlines, hotels, and experiences. The AI opportunity: travel involves enormous research and coordination overhead that AI compresses — from trip planning to booking optimization to customer service — enabling solo operators to build highly personalized travel tools at scale.

top_opportunities.title: AI Points & Miles Optimizer (Maximize Award Travel)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build an AI agent that connects to a user's credit card and airline/hotel accounts, tracks all points balances, identifies expiring points, and recommends the optimal redemption strategy for their travel goals. Includes availability alerts for award seats. Charge $9-$29/mo. 100M+ Americans have loyalty points they underutilize. The Points Guy monetizes via referrals; your tool monetizes via subscription.
top_opportunities.moat: Points portfolio history creates personalized recommendations; booking alerts create daily habit
top_opportunities.first_step: Build loyalty account scrapers (Plaid doesn't cover points — use CSV import); create points valuation model; launch on Product Hunt + r/churning
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI understands complex transfer partner chains ('Transfer Chase → Hyatt → book IHG properties through Hyatt cross-redemption') that require expert knowledge most people don't have

top_opportunities.title: Automated Corporate Travel Policy & Expense Compliance
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build an AI agent that integrates with corporate booking tools (Concur, TripActions) and automatically flags out-of-policy bookings before they happen, generates pre-trip approval workflows, and produces exception reports. Charge $5-$15/employee/mo to mid-market companies (100-2000 employees). Saves finance teams 20+ hours/month reviewing expense reports.
top_opportunities.moat: Policy configuration creates employer lock-in; employee behavior data creates violation pattern database
top_opportunities.first_step: Build Concur API integration + policy rule engine; create violation report demo; post in CFO/finance LinkedIn communities
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI reads unstructured travel policy documents and turns them into enforceable rules — a task that currently requires manual configuration by travel managers

top_opportunities.title: Visa & Entry Requirements Intelligence Service
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Monitor government embassy and travel advisory websites across 195 countries for visa requirement changes. When requirements change (new e-visa available, processing time changes, new COVID rules), alert subscribers instantly. Sell B2B to travel agencies, corporate travel managers, and immigration consultants at $99-$499/mo. IATA Travel Centre charges airlines thousands/month for similar data.
top_opportunities.moat: Historical change tracking creates unique audit trail; parsing 195 government websites is a technical barrier
top_opportunities.first_step: Build scraper monitoring 20 most-visited country embassy sites; set up change detection; create free API for 5 beta travel agencies
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI parses inconsistently formatted government documents across 195 countries and extracts structured visa requirement data — a task no human team can do cost-effectively
